description: Registry of recognized non-native DeFi/NFT programs. Programs listed here are known to the classifier and will NOT trigger the unknown-program-writable REJECT path. Each entry includes the discriminator scheme used by that program. Per-instruction danger entries list specific instructions that are dangerous and their severity. Any instruction NOT listed as dangerous on a recognized program yields a HOLD (never SIGN).

programs.name: Metaplex Token Metadata
programs.description: Metaplex Token Metadata program. Manages NFT/token metadata, creators, and on-chain authority.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: Transfer NFT
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Transfers ownership of an NFT from the signer to an attacker-controlled wallet — direct NFT theft.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: Delegate NFT authority
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Grants a delegate authority over the NFT (transfer, burn, lock, etc.). A malicious delegate can steal or burn the NFT after signing.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: Revoke NFT delegate
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Revokes a delegate authority. Low risk on its own but part of authority-management flows; verify the target account.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: Burn NFT (pNFT)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Burns a programmable NFT (pNFT), permanently destroying it.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: BurnNft (legacy)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Burns a legacy NFT token, permanently destroying it.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: Update metadata
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Updates on-chain metadata (name, URI, creators, seller fee). An attacker can change the NFT URI to point to malicious content or alter royalty splits.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: UpdateMetadataAccount
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Legacy UpdateMetadataAccount — changes on-chain NFT metadata URI/name/symbol.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: UpdateMetadataAccountV2
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Updates metadata using v2 schema (adds creators/uses/collection fields).

programs.name: Metaplex Bubblegum (cNFT)
programs.description: Metaplex Bubblegum program for compressed NFTs (cNFTs). Uses Anchor 8-byte discriminators.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Transfer cNFT
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Transfers ownership of a compressed NFT to the destination wallet — direct cNFT theft if attacker is destination.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Transfer cNFT v2
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: V2 transfer of a compressed NFT — same theft risk as Transfer.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Delegate cNFT authority
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Grants a delegate authority over the cNFT. A malicious delegate can steal or burn the cNFT.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Delegate cNFT authority v2
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: V2 delegate for cNFT — same risk as Delegate.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Delegate and freeze cNFT v2
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Delegates and freezes the cNFT simultaneously, preventing further transfers until thawed.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Burn cNFT v2
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: V2 burn of a compressed NFT — permanent destruction.

programs.name: Jupiter Aggregator v6
programs.description: Jupiter v6 swap aggregator. All instructions default to HOLD (recognized-unknown-instruction) unless individually decoded.

programs.name: Orca Whirlpools
programs.description: Orca Whirlpools concentrated-liquidity AMM. All instructions default to HOLD.

programs.name: Raydium AMM v4
programs.description: Raydium AMM v4 liquidity program. All instructions default to HOLD.
